Eligibility Criteria

Students from only ZP, Model or KGBV schools in class 10th can register! If you don't see your school in the list or find it difficult to register, please call 9550895968 or email to admin@sadisha.org with your details.

Structure of the Exam

It’s an OPEN BOOK exam. That is, students can refer to any textbook or notes during the exam. Mobile phones and calculators are not allowed. Duration of this exam will be 60 minutes and the question paper contains 10 problems.

All the answers are non-negative integers. Candidates must carry their Aadhaar card to the exam.

Questions and Scoring Strategy

The scoring is relative. That is, marks for a correct answer depend upon how many people have correctly answered the question.
An easy question correctly solved by several people can fetch only 1.12 marks while a hard question solved by very few can fetch as many as 1.99 marks.

Prize Structure

Up to 70 students will be provided free Intermediate Education (+2) including hostel fee in a good college in a nearby town. 18 of these belong to the open category, 26 reserved for ZP schools students and 26 are reserved for ZP girl students. Seat distribution varies by district. A cut-off score of 2 questions will be applicable for these seats.

Top 3 schools in open category and top 3 schools in ZP category will get a memento in addition to the cash prize detailed below.

Each question is rewarded with Rs 256. Those schools who score a minimum of 20 total questions, will be rewarded and the maximum amount we pay is 25600. That is, if 10 students from your school altogether solve 20 questions, your school gets 5120 rupees as a cash prize. This amount will be paid through a cheque and the bank account should only belong to the school. No personal bank accounts are entertained.
